# truenas_network_interface (Data Source)

Provides information about a network interface on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_network_interface" "eno1" {
  id = "eno1"
}

output "interface_state" {
  value = data.truenas_network_interface.eno1.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The interface ID (name, e.g. 'br0', 'vlan10').

### Read-Only

- `aliases` (Attributes List) Static IP aliases. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aliases))
- `bridge_members` (List of String) Bridge member interfaces (for BRIDGE type).
- `description` (String) Interface description.
- `ipv4_dhcp` (Boolean) Whether IPv4 DHCP is enabled.
- `ipv6_auto` (Boolean) Whether IPv6 autoconfiguration is enabled.
- `lag_ports` (List of String) LAG member ports (for LINK_AGGREGATION type).
- `lag_protocol` (String) LAG protocol (for LINK_AGGREGATION type).
- `mtu` (Number) Interface MTU.
- `name` (String) The interface name.
- `type` (String) Interface type (PHYSICAL, BRIDGE, LINK_AGGREGATION, VLAN).
- `vlan_parent_interface` (String) Parent interface (for VLAN type).
- `vlan_pcp` (Number) VLAN PCP (for VLAN type).
- `vlan_tag` (Number) VLAN tag (for VLAN type).

<a id="nestedatt--aliases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aliases`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) Alias address.
- `netmask` (Number) Alias netmask (prefix length).
- `type` (String) Alias address family (INET, INET6).
